message:
You know that one friend who's always ready for anything? Well, I might be that friend in my circle! Just the other day, I was in the kitchen making dinner when I suddenly remembered the time I watched a cooking show that mentioned keeping a fire extinguisher nearby. So, there I was, pulling my little fire extinguisher out from under the sink just to feel a bit safer while sautéing veggies. My family laughed, but I reassured them that it’s better to be safe than sorry! 

And honestly, it sparked a great conversation about our family escape plan and checking smoke alarms. It’s all about those little reminders to stay prepared without being alarmed, right? 

Have you ever found yourself being the gloriously over-prepared one? What’s your go-to safety tip?
